title: Edge Sewing Lockranding Tool Set 3pcs Edge Stitch Lock and Sewing Gauge, Seam Guide for Hand Sewing, DIY Edge Even Stitching Lock Kit for Quilting and Crafting (4mm/3mm/3mm)
features: Achieve Perfect Stitches: Our edge stitch lock and sewing gauge ensures precise stitch lines, making it an essential edge sewing lockranding tool for both beginners and experts. Ideal for quilting, hemming, and crafting.
Multi-Functional Design: This edge sewing tool combines the functions of a sewing needle gauge measuring tool and a seam guide for hand sewing, providing versatility for various sewing projects.

Ergonomic and Durable: Crafted from high-quality ABS plastic, our edge sewing and lockranding tool features an ergonomic thumb design, reducing hand fatigue and ensuring a comfortable sewing experience.
Consistent Accuracy: The sewing template lockranding guide tool offers precise control over stitch distances (2mm, 3mm, 4mm), making it perfect for achieving uniform stitches in any sewing project.
Wide Application: Suitable for both amateurs and professionals, this edge even stitching lock kit enhances your sewing experience, allowing you to create beautiful crafts with ease and precision.
description: Enhance your sewing projects with our comprehensive Edge Sewing Lockranding Tool Set, designed to meet the needs of both beginners and seasoned professionals. This set includes three precision edge stitch lock and sewing gauges, each crafted from durable ABS plastic, ensuring long-lasting use and consistent results. The ergonomic thumb design of these tools provides a comfortable grip, reducing hand fatigue during extended sewing sessions. Our edge sewing lockranding tool is perfect for achieving uniform stitches, whether you're working on straight, curved, or decorative seams. The sewing needle gauge measuring tool offers precise control over stitch distances, with options for 2mm, 3mm, and 4mm spacing, making it ideal for a variety of sewing projects. The edge sewing and lockranding tool also serves as a seam guide for hand sewing, allowing you to maintain consistent seam allowances effortlessly. The sewing template lockranding guide tool simplifies the measuring process, ensuring accuracy and ease of use. This edge even stitching lock kit is a must-have for anyone looking to create beautiful crafts with precision and ease. Whether you're quilting, hemming, or crafting, our edge stitch lock and sewing gauge set will help you achieve professional-quality results every time. Specifications: Name: Edge Sewing Lockranding Tool Color: White Material: ABS Plastic Function: Use as a sewing ruler, DIY sewing guide, or seam guide.
